movesList.name: qcf
inputs: - quarter circle forward   / d, df, f

movesList.name: qcb
inputs: - quarter circle back      / d, db, b

movesList.name: hcf
inputs: - half circle forward      / b, db, d, df, f

movesList.name: hcb
inputs: - half circle back         / f, df, d, db, b

movesList.name: Tap
inputs: - Press the assigned button or direction light and quickly.

movesList.name: Press
inputs: - Just...press it! Like dialling a phone number, okay?

movesList.name: Hold
inputs: - Hold the assigned button or direction for some time.

movesList.name: Air Block
inputs: - b / db when jumping up / back

movesList.name: Dash
inputs: - f, f (hold f to maintain run)

movesList.name: Slide Attack
inputs: - A / B during Slide / Dodge Slide

movesList.name: Guard Escape
inputs: - when blocking, AB / b + AB (consumes 1 stock)

movesList.name: Autoguard
inputs: - there is a built-in 'blocking' frame in the (X) hit of

movesList.name: 'Earthquake'
inputs: - there is some sort of earthquake when the move is

movesList.name: Hits low
inputs: - must be blocked low on the (X) hit of the move.

movesList.name: Juggles
inputs: - hits your enemy into the air on the (X) hit of the move

movesList.name: Overhead
inputs: - must be blocked high on the (X) hit of the move.

movesList.name: Unblockable
inputs: - You cannot block the move when ... .

movesList.name: Close air counter
inputs: - Hits opponents that try to jump in when close.

movesList.name: Combo setup
inputs: - Opens the enemy for a combo opportunity.

movesList.name: Far air counter
inputs: - Hits opponents that try to jump in when far.
